title: QuickKneadPro
description: A quick-fix Brazilian dish featuring fermented and gooey paella rice kneaded with high-protein-friendly ingredients for a healthy meal.

ingredients.name: 2 eggs
ingredients.notes: Crack into a bowl and beat well before use

ingredients.name: Half cup of chopped fresh parsley
Quarter cup of grated parmesan cheese

instructions: Combine the cooked paella rice, beaten eggs, parsley, parmesan cheese (if using), and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Add minced garlic and smoked paprika to the mixture and stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture into a shallow dish or pan. Let it sit at room temperature for 10-20 minutes to allow the egg mixture to set slightly.
Knead the mixture by hand for about 3-5 minutes, using a small amount of olive oil if needed to prevent sticking.
Serve immediately as is or with additional toppings like fresh herbs and more parmesan cheese.
